description:
Create a SciNote inventory named 'Lab Reagents Q4-2024' with custom columns for 'CAS Number' (Text), 'Molecular Weight (g/mol)' (Number), 'Storage Condition' (List: 'Room Temperature', '2-8°C', '-20°C', '-80°C'), and 'Expiration Date' (Date). Populate the inventory with the following items:

Item 2: Name: Tris-HCl, CAS Number: 1185-53-1, Molecular Weight (g/mol): 157.60, Storage Condition: 2-8°C, Expiration Date: 06/30/2025
Item 3: Name: Dimethyl Sulfoxide, CAS Number: 67-68-5, Molecular Weight (g/mol): 78.13, Storage Condition: Room Temperature, Expiration Date: 03/15/2026
